rationale: Primary reference preserves Bölüm 6 canonical single-reference visual QC logic
downstream_effect: Drives canonical PNG, primary residue tables, main decision matrix evidence

rationale: Supporting references preserve multi-reference biological context without exploding PNG count
downstream_effect: Used for TSV/audit/context/conflict flags; no mass PNG generation

value: Rank-1/primary remains the default automatic interpretation anchor
rationale: Bölüm 4 and Bölüm 6 were calibrated around primary/best reference behavior
downstream_effect: Automatic class changes must not be driven by supporting references alone

value: Top5 references are retained as contextual/supporting evidence
rationale: Protects against apo/holo, partial-domain, paralog/functional-shift problems

value: Generate canonical v6 PNG only for primary reference
rationale: Prevents 237 proteins x 5 references x 6 panels explosion
downstream_effect: M10F visual output remains compact and interpretable

value: No automatic PNG for rank-2 to rank-5 references
rationale: Supporting structures may be visually inspected manually only if flagged

value: Query and resolved reference P2Rank results remain valid for primary and supporting references
rationale: P2Rank is geometric pocket prediction, not experimental active-site proof
downstream_effect: Used as evidence layer with caution

value: PDB/heteroatom/ligand evidence from supporting references can raise review priority but not automatically confirm function
rationale: HETATM contact is not always biological; apo/holo must be interpreted cautiously
downstream_effect: Feeds M13 rulebook as supporting/contextual evidence

value: M12 must separate primary evidence from supporting evidence
rationale: Prevents overclaiming while preserving alternative evidence
downstream_effect: Outputs primary class plus supporting/context flags

value: M13 must distinguish primary ligand/cofactor evidence and supporting ligand/cofactor evidence
rationale: Section 8 logic requires cautious interpretation of motifs, cofactors and residue-level contacts
downstream_effect: Outputs final evidence class with caution labels

value: Candidates are viral-contig encoded; divergence from bacterial/host references is expected
